thesis: Large multi-agent systems coordinate to maximum effect when they become proof-governed sovereign institutions.

coordinationLaw.maximumCoordination: verified useful work per unit of risk, cost, latency, and proof debt
coordinationLaw.antiPattern: agents talking without bounded work, observable traces, validator judgment, settlement, Chronicle memory, or reusable capability

swarm.label: Unstructured swarm
swarm.purpose: Shows high activity with weak proof and high proof debt.

crew.label: Fixed crew
crew.purpose: Shows role structure but limited adaptive proof governance.

institution.label: Proof-governed institution
institution.purpose: Shows bounded work, validators, risk state, settlement readiness, Chronicle memory, and reusable capability.

claimBoundary: No personal, confidential, regulated, wallet, seed, private-key, or customer data should be entered.
No wallet connection, token approval, network switch, Mainnet broadcast, or fund authorization.
